scenes.title: South Asian Dynasty – Main Hall
scenes.description: Primary 360° view introducing South Asian dynasties, architecture, and royal spaces.

scenes.title: Dynasty Creation – Metal Sculpture
scenes.description: Lost-wax bronze and copper-alloy sculptures from Chola, Gupta, and Gandhara traditions.

scenes.title: Dynasty Creation – Trade & Coins
scenes.description: Ancient trade routes, coin usage, and caravan-based commerce linking South Asia globally.

scenes.title: Dynasty Creation – Temple & Artistic Legacy
scenes.description: Temple spaces and artistic environments reflecting dynasty-era religious and cultural expression.
